section1.details: Service for cachless tip by using QR-code

one.end: of clients can’t find a cash for tip

three.end: of service and get more clients

points.text: QR code can be printed on acard/ sticker/table-tent or on abill. We help to make design or integrate to system for every client
Customer easily scans QR code by smartphone. No need to download an application
Our QR code leads toa wedpage, that allows to choose a tip amountand leave a feedback.
You can see all the information about tips and get money to the card from personal account
